ddls:
CREATE TABLE "covered_entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each covered entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the covered entity */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the entity is located */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the covered entity (e.g., provider, plan) */,
  "individuals_affected" INTEGER /* Number of individuals affected by the breach */,
  "breach_submission_date" TEXT /* Date the breach was submitted */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the entity */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the entity */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Fax number of the entity */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "breaches" (
  "breach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each breach incident */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the covered entity involved in the breach */,
  "breach_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of breach (e.g., theft, loss) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location where the breached information was stored */,
  "business_associate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the business associate involved in the breach */,
  "breach_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the breach */,
  "breach_date" TEXT /* Date the breach occurred */,
  "discovery_date" TEXT /* Date the breach was discovered */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the breach was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("breach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_breaches_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES covered_entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "individuals_affected" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual affected */,
  "breach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the breach incident */,
  "individual_name" TEXT /* Name of the affected individual */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the individual */,
  "affected_since" TEXT /* Date the individual was affected */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "social_security_number" TEXT /* Social security number of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_affected_breach_id FOREIGN KEY ("breach_id") REFERENCES breaches ("breach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "breach_types" (
  "breach_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each breach type */,
  "breach_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the breach type (e.g., Theft, Loss) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the breach type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("breach_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., Laptop, Network Server) */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_associates" (
  "associate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business associate */,
  "associate_name" TEXT /* Name of the business associate */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the associate */,
  "business_associate_type" TEXT /* Type of the business associate (e.g., IT services, data storage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("associate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response action */,
  "breach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the breach incident */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response (e.g., containment, eradication) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_breach_id FOREIGN KEY ("breach_id") REFERENCES breaches ("breach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "breach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the breach incident */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., affected individuals, government agencies) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, mail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_breach_id FOREIGN KEY ("breach_id") REFERENCES breaches ("breach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "breach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the breach incident */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was logged */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Time the action was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_breach_id FOREIGN KEY ("breach_id") REFERENCES breaches ("breach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., compliance officer, IT security) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security measure */,
  "breach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the breach incident */,
  "measure_description" TEXT /* Description of the security measure */,
  "implementation_date" TEXT /* Date the measure was implemented */,
  "measure_type" TEXT /* Type of the security measure (e.g., technical, administrative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_measures_breach_id FOREIGN KEY ("breach_id") REFERENCES breaches ("breach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_notices" (
  "notice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulatory notice */,
  "breach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the breach incident */,
  "notice_type" TEXT /* Type of notice filed (e.g., HHS, state authorities) */,
  "filed_date" TEXT /* Date the notice was filed */,
  "regulatory_agency" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory agency (e.g., HHS, state) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_notices_breach_id FOREIGN KEY ("breach_id") REFERENCES breaches ("breach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "breach_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the covered entity */,
  "total_breaches" INTEGER /* Total number of breaches reported */,
  "total_individuals_affected" INTEGER /* Total number of individuals affected across all breaches */,
  "last_breach_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reported breach */,
  "average_breaches_per_year" REAL /* Average number of breaches per year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_breach_statistics_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES covered_entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "login_date" TEXT /* Date the user logged in */,
  "logout_date" TEXT /* Date the user logged out */,
  "session_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., system startup, system shutdown) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the event occurred */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)
